inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of filament or resin per kilogram. Based on supplier pricing and industry benchmarks (e.g., Stratasys, Formlabs).

inputs.label: Material Usage per Job
inputs.businessContext: Weight of material consumed for the print job, including support material. Estimated from slicing software or historical data.

inputs.label: Print Time
inputs.businessContext: Total machine runtime for the job. Critical for machine utilization and energy cost estimation.

inputs.label: Machine Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Depreciation, maintenance, and overhead cost per hour. Calculated based on machine purchase price, lifespan, and maintenance schedule (ISO 15663).

inputs.label: Labor Hourly Rate
inputs.businessContext: Operator wage including benefits. Based on local labor market and skill level required (e.g., technician vs engineer).

inputs.label: Labor Hours per Job
inputs.businessContext: Time spent on setup, monitoring, post-processing, and quality inspection. Lean manufacturing principles (SMED) can reduce this.

inputs.label: Energy Cost per kWh
inputs.businessContext: Local electricity rate. Energy consumption is a significant cost driver for high-temperature printing (ISO 50001).

inputs.label: Machine Power Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Average power draw during printing. Varies by printer model and material (e.g., PLA vs PEEK).

inputs.label: Defect Rate
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of jobs that fail or require rework. Based on historical quality data (Six Sigma DMAIC).

inputs.label: Overhead Rate
inputs.businessContext: Facility, administrative, and indirect costs as a percentage of direct costs. Standard cost accounting practice.

inputs.label: Selling Price per Job
inputs.businessContext: Price charged to customer. Determined by market research and value-based pricing.

inputs.label: Data Confidence Level
inputs.businessContext: Subjective confidence in input data accuracy. Used to adjust final margin for uncertainty (Monte Carlo simulation concept).

thresholds.defectRate: defectRate > 10 ? 'High defect rate: investigate process stability' : ''
thresholds.marginPercent: marginPercent < 10 ? 'Low margin: consider cost reduction or price increase' : ''
thresholds.dataConfidence: dataConfidence < 50 ? 'Low data confidence: results may be unreliable' : ''

suggestedActions: defectRate > 10 ? 'Implement process control (SPC) and root cause analysis' : ''
marginPercent < 10 ? 'Review material sourcing, reduce print time, or increase price' : ''
dataConfidence < 50 ? 'Collect more accurate data from sensors and job logs' : ''
